A

absolutePeriodic(D) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
An overrideable hook for custom logic that must run every loop iteration, independent of the current Request (e.g., updating odometry).
ActionButtons(Trigger, Trigger, Trigger, Trigger) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.ActionButtons
Creates an instance of a ActionButtons record class.
ActionStatus - Class in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
Represents a snapshot of an action or subsystem's state at a specific point in time.
actor - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
The hardware interface implementation (Real, Sim, or Fallback).
AnalogAxis(DoubleSupplier, DoubleSupplier) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.AnalogAxis
Creates an instance of a AnalogAxis record class.
AnalogTriggers(Trigger, Trigger) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.AnalogTriggers
Creates an instance of a AnalogTriggers record class.
apply(P, A) - Method in interface com.stzteam.mars.requests.Request
Executes the logic of this request for a single periodic loop iteration.
assertGreaterThan(DoubleSupplier, double, String) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Verifies that a given value is strictly greater than a minimum threshold.
assertLessThan(DoubleSupplier, double, String) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Verifies that a given value is strictly less than a maximum threshold.
assertTrue(BooleanSupplier, String) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Verifies that a given boolean condition evaluates to true.

B

back() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.SpecialTriggers
Returns the value of the back record component.
bind() - Method in interface com.stzteam.mars.models.containers.Binding
Executes the configuration of button mappings and trigger conditions.
Binding - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.models.containers
A functional interface used to encapsulate controller button or trigger bindings.
Blackboard - Class in com.stzteam.mars.blackboard
 
BlackboardKey<T> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.blackboard
A strongly-typed key used to read and write data to the Blackboard.
BlackboardKey(String, Class<T>) - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.blackboard.BlackboardKey
Defines a new typed key for the Blackboard.
BLINK_FAST - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern.Style
Fast on/off blinking (useful for errors).
BLINK_SLOW - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern.Style
Slow on/off blinking (useful for working states).
blinkFast(Color) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a fast-blinking pattern.
blinkSlow(Color) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a slow-blinking pattern.
bootSequence() - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.utils.TerminalGCS
Logs the initial startup sequence and configuration of the framework.
bottom() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.ActionButtons
Returns the value of the bottom record component.
breathing(Color) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a smooth breathing (fade in/out) pattern.
BREATHING - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern.Style
Smooth transition between the base color and black.
Builder<T> - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.builder
A generic interface for constructing complex subsystems or modules within the MARS framework.
buildModule() - Method in interface com.stzteam.mars.builder.Builder
Assembles and finalizes the configuration of the module.
Bumpers(Trigger, Trigger) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.Bumpers
Creates an instance of a Bumpers record class.

C

calculateError(double, double) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
A helper method to create a supplier that continuously calculates the absolute error between a target setpoint and a current position (useful for PID verification).
code - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
The core status/diagnostic code.
colorHex() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPayload
Returns the value of the colorHex record component.

com.stzteam.mars.utils - package com.stzteam.mars.utils
 
CompositeData<T extends CompositeData<T>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules
The foundational data structure for complex subsystems that are composed of multiple distinct sub-modules (e.g., a Swerve Drive containing four individual Swerve Modules).
CompositeData() - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules.CompositeData
 
CompositeIO<D extends CompositeData<D>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules
A specialized IO interface designed to manage hardware interactions for composite subsystems.
CompositeIO() - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules.CompositeIO
 
CompositeSubsystem<D extends CompositeData<D>,A extends CompositeIO<D>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules
A specialized subsystem class for complex mechanisms composed of multiple smaller subsystems.
CompositeSubsystem(SubsystemBuilder<D, A>) - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules.CompositeSubsystem
Constructs a CompositeSubsystem using the provided configuration builder.
ControllerContainer - Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
A utility class containing standardized data records for generic controller inputs.
ControllerContainer() - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer
 
ControllerContainer.ActionButtons - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the primary action face buttons mapped by their physical position.
ControllerContainer.AnalogAxis - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the raw continuous values of the analog triggers.
ControllerContainer.AnalogTriggers - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the analog triggers treated as digital buttons (pressed or not pressed).
ControllerContainer.Bumpers - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the top shoulder buttons (L1/R1 or LB/RB).
ControllerContainer.DPadTriggers - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the directional pad (D-Pad) or POV hat.
ControllerContainer.SpecialTriggers - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents the central system or menu buttons.
ControllerContainer.Stick - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.operator
Represents a 2D joystick/thumbstick.
ControllerOI - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.operator
The core Operator Interface (OI) abstraction for the MARS framework.
createIO(boolean, Supplier<T>, Supplier<T>, Supplier<T>) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.builder.Injector
Safely instantiates an IO implementation based on the robot's current environment.
CRITICAL - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.StatusCode.Severity
System encountered a fatal or unrecoverable hardware fault.

D

Data<T> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule
The foundational data structure representing a snapshot of hardware inputs.

delay(double) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Pauses the test execution for a specified duration.
DiagnosticPattern - Class in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
Defines a visual behavior pattern for LEDs or dashboard indicators.
DiagnosticPattern(Color, DiagnosticPattern.Style) - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a new diagnostic pattern.
DiagnosticPattern.Style - Enum Class in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
Available animation styles for the diagnostic pattern.
DiagnosticPayload - Record Class in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
A lightweight data carrier representing an evaluated diagnostic state.
DiagnosticPayload(String, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPayload
Creates an instance of a DiagnosticPayload record class.
down() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.DPadTriggers
Returns the value of the down record component.
DPadTriggers(Trigger, Trigger, Trigger, Trigger) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.DPadTriggers
Creates an instance of a DPadTriggers record class.

Manages the global execution state of the robot within the MARS framework.

Defines the current execution context of the robot program.

Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

Quick factory method for an error state with a custom message.
ERROR - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.StatusCode.Severity
System encountered a recoverable error (e.g., sensor timeout).
evaluateHex() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Evaluates the current color of the pattern based on the WPILib FPGA timestamp.
execute(Q) - Method in interface com.stzteam.mars.services.Service
Executes the service logic based on the provided query.

The data structure containing the latest hardware readings.

The hardware abstraction layer interface for MARS subsystems.

The root container interface for the MARS framework.
isCritical() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Checks if this status represents a critical hardware fault.
isDone() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Checks if this status represents an OK/Nominal state.
isFallback - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Indicates if the subsystem is running on a dummy IO implementation.
isFallback() - Method in interface com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.IO
Determines if this IO implementation is a "dummy" or fallback layer.
isFallback() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.FallbackNode
 
isFallback() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node

M

MARS_VERSION - Static variable in class com.stzteam.mars.generated.MarsConstants
 
MARSAssertionError - Exception in com.stzteam.mars.test
A custom runtime exception thrown when a MARS framework test assertion fails.

Constructs a new MARSAssertionError with the specified detail message.

MarsConstants() - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.generated.MarsConstants
 
MARSTest - Annotation Interface in com.stzteam.mars.test
An annotation used to label and name specific test routines within the MARS framework.
message - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
A descriptive message providing context for the status.
message() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPayload
Returns the value of the message record component.
messagePayload - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node
The mutable data structure holding the processing results.

The core architectural building block of the MARS framework.

Constructs a ModularSubsystem using the provided configuration builder.

The custom, human-readable name of the test routine.
Node<M extends NodeMessage<M>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes
The core computational unit of the MARS background processing architecture.
Node(String, M, Consumer<M>) - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node
Constructs a new computational Node.
NodeMessage<M> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes
Represents the data payload generated and broadcasted by a Node.
NodeMessage() - Constructor for class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.NodeMessage
 
nodeName - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node
The unique identifier for this node, used for telemetry and logging.
NOMINAL - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.GlobalCode
The system is fully operational and healthy.

O

of(StatusCode) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Creates an ActionStatus using the default name of the provided code.
of(StatusCode, String) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Creates an ActionStatus with a specific code and custom message.
ok() - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Quick factory method for a generic nominal/OK state.
OK - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.StatusCode.Severity
System is functioning nominally.
overrideStatus(ActionStatus) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Forcefully overrides the current diagnostic status (e.g., triggering an emergency halt).

P

periodic() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node
The main execution loop of the node.
periodicLogic() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
The primary execution loop of the subsystem.

Logs the final count of mounted hardware modules after initialization.

Ignored implementation.
processInformation() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node
Custom logic implementation for the node.

A concrete implementation of the ControllerOI for PlayStation 5 DualSense controllers.

Initializes the PS5 controller mapping.

Q

Query - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.services
A marker interface representing the input payload for a Service.

R

read(BlackboardKey<T>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.blackboard.Blackboard
Reads a value from the blackboard securely using its typed key.
REAL - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.builder.Environment.RunMode
Running on the roboRIO with actual physical hardware (motors, sensors, etc.).
registerChild(ModularSubsystem<?, ?>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.multimodules.CompositeIO
Registers a child subsystem to this composite IO structure.
registerModuleMount(String, boolean) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.utils.TerminalGCS
Registers a module's instantiation into the terminal's hardware tree.
registerRemoteRequest(String, String, Request<?, ?>) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.utils.TerminalGCS
Registers a specific Request object so that it can be triggered remotely via the GCS app.
registerSubsystem(ModularSubsystem<?, ?>) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.utils.TerminalGCS
Stores a reference to an active subsystem to allow remote request injection.
registerTelemetry(Telemetry<D>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Assigns a telemetry broadcaster to the subsystem dynamically.
REPLAY - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.builder.Environment.RunMode
Replaying historical data from a log file (no active hardware or physics).
Reply - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.services
A marker interface representing the output payload from a Service.
request(Request<D, A>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.SubsystemBuilder
Sets the default or initial request the subsystem will run upon boot.
Request<P,A> - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.requests
Represents a specific action or state machine logic block within the MARS framework.
right() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.ActionButtons
Returns the value of the right record component.
right() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.AnalogAxis
Returns the value of the right record component.
right() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.AnalogTriggers
Returns the value of the right record component.
right() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.Bumpers
Returns the value of the right record component.
right() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.DPadTriggers
Returns the value of the right record component.
run(Request, ModularSubsystem) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Wraps a MARS Request into an instantaneous WPILib Command, injecting it directly into the specified ModularSubsystem.
run(Runnable, Subsystem...) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Wraps a standard runnable action into an instantaneous WPILib Command.
runRequest(Supplier<? extends Request<D, A>>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Creates a WPILib Command that executes a specific Request endlessly until interrupted.
runRequestUntilDone(Supplier<? extends Request<D, A>>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Creates a WPILib Command that executes a specific Request and automatically finishes when the subsystem's ActionStatus evaluates to 'Done' (Severity.OK).
runTest(TestRoutine) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestScheduler
Packages a test routine into a deployable WPILib command with lifecycle logging.

S

Service<Q extends Query,R extends Reply> - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.services
A functional interface representing a synchronous or asynchronous operation that takes a request and returns a computed response.
setMode(Environment.RunMode) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.builder.Environment
Sets the global execution mode of the robot.
setRequest(Request<D, A>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.ModularSubsystem
Updates the active Request (state machine logic) running on the subsystem.
setup() - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.SubsystemBuilder
Initializes a new builder instance.
SIM - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.builder.Environment.RunMode
Running on a development machine using simulated physics and virtual IO.
snapshot() - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.Data
Casts the current data instance to its concrete subclass type.
solid(Color) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a static, solid color pattern.
SOLID - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern.Style
Constant color, no animation.
SpecialTriggers(Trigger, Trigger) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.SpecialTriggers
Creates an instance of a SpecialTriggers record class.
start() - Method in record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.SpecialTriggers
Returns the value of the start record component.
StatusCode - Interface in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
Represents a generic diagnostic status code within the MARS framework.
StatusCode.Severity - Enum Class in com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics
Defines the severity level of a diagnostic status.
Stick(DoubleSupplier, DoubleSupplier) - Constructor for record class com.stzteam.mars.operator.ControllerContainer.Stick
Creates an instance of a Stick record class.
strobe(Color) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern
Creates a strobe (rapid flash) pattern.
STROBE - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.DiagnosticPattern.Style
Very rapid flashing.
SubsystemBuilder<D extends Data<D>,A extends IO<D>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models
A fluent builder for constructing ModularSubsystem instances.

T

telemeterize(D, ActionStatus) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.Telemetry
Publishes the subsystem's current state and status to the telemetry outputs.
telemeterize(String) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.NodeMessage
Publishes the contents of this message to the network tables or dashboard.
telemetry(Telemetry<D>) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.models.SubsystemBuilder
Attaches a telemetry implementation to broadcast the subsystem's data.
Telemetry<D extends Data<D>> - Class in com.stzteam.mars.models
Defines a contract for broadcasting subsystem data to network tables or logging frameworks.

The Ground Control Station (GCS) Terminal manager for the MARS framework.

TestRoutine - Class in com.stzteam.mars.test
The abstract base class for defining hardware testing sequences in the MARS framework.

TestScheduler - Class in com.stzteam.mars.test
A utility class responsible for scheduling and executing TestRoutine instances.

TIMEOUT - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.GlobalCode
A communication or sensor timeout has occurred.
timestamp - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
The WPILib FPGA timestamp when this status was generated.
timestamp - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.models.singlemodule.Data
The exact WPILib FPGA timestamp when this data was generated/updated.

Returns the value of the top record component.
topicPublisher - Variable in class com.stzteam.mars.services.nodes.Node

W

waitFor(BooleanSupplier, double) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
Creates a command that halts the test sequence until a specific condition is met, or until the timeout is reached.
warning(String) - Static method in class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.ActionStatus
Quick factory method for a warning state with a custom message.
WARNING - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.StatusCode.Severity
System is functioning but requires attention (e.g., high temperature).
WORKING - Enum constant in enum class com.stzteam.mars.diagnostics.GlobalCode
The system is currently executing an action or in a transient state.
write(BlackboardKey<T>, T) - Method in class com.stzteam.mars.blackboard.Blackboard
Writes a value to the blackboard using a strongly-typed key.
